subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Be not sad, neither do thou grieve. Be content with the bounty of the Ancient Beauty
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله محزون نباش دلخون نباش بعنایت جمالقدم روحى
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
